'''Hathrox III''' was an urban [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Hathrox system/Legends|Hathrox system]]. Its civilization was destroyed in a biochemical [[Hathrox III civil war|civil war]] in about [[1196 BBY]]<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|25|Hathrox III}}</ref>. The planet was quarantined by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. All attempts by [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] to study the planet resulted in their [[Death/Legends|deaths]], as well as the deaths of the rescue team that came after them, and the quarantine staff that came after them.
